page_info.title: Events
page_info.subtitle: Tutorials, workshops and challenges I organize, plus conferences I attend

organized.title: CVPR 2025 Tutorial: Identifying Structure in Data
organized.description: An in-depth exploration of state-of-the-art data exploration techniques including dimensionality reduction for data visualization and clustering methods, with a strong focus on computer vision applications.

attending.name: ICML 2026
attending.note: We will present Marios Koulakis' "The Data Manifold Under the Microscope" at the main conference and at the Mechanistic Interpretability workshop.
